bottom_line: Add Jinja2 Markup/safe-filter guidance to Backend implementation prompts to prevent 2-3 retry cycles on docs-rendering features; fix filename pattern mismatch between prompts and step report output.
coverage_notes: Full logs read for S01-S07, S15. QV gate logs (S08-S14) read in full — all clean. S15 browser verification logs: env-up/env-down logs empty, main S15 log empty (browser automation succeeded silently). No fix cycles. No install/setup commands detected in any log.

findings.title: S01 Backend agent required 3 internal test retries to converge on correct implementation
findings.recommendation: Add a note to the Backend implementation prompt template clarifying that when passing pre-rendered HTML content to Jinja2 templates, use the |safe filter to prevent double-escaping. This is a common pitfall when using markupsafe.Markup with Jinja2's |tojson.
evidence: CR-00042_S01_run1.log:78 — 'AssertionError: expected 200, got 404' (first run, route not registered yet)
CR-00042_S01_run1.log:416 — 'AssertionError: response should contain rendered HTML headings' (second run, Markup double-escaped)
CR-00042_S01_run1.log:698 — same AssertionError (third run, still investigating)
CR-00042_S01_run1.log:456 — 'The Markup is being double-escaped by Jinja2\'s |tojson filter. I need to use |safe' (root cause found)
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add Jinja2 Markup/safe-filter guidance to Backend implementation prompts; analyzed in CR-00042 (see ai-dev/work/CR-00042/reports/CR-00042_self_assess_report.md). Target file: templates/design/CR_Template.md. Effort: S.

findings.title: CodeReview agents failed to read step reports due to filename pattern mismatch
findings.recommendation: The agent prompts use a lowercase pattern (backend-impl, code_review) while the actual step report filenames use capitalized agent labels (Backend, CodeReview). Fix the prompt filename generator or standardize the convention. Also consider having iw step-done verify the report filename matches what the next step expects.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Fix filename pattern mismatch between prompts and step report output (backend-impl vs Backend); analyzed in CR-00042 (see ai-dev/work/CR-00042/reports/CR-00042_self_assess_report.md). Target: orch/cli/step_commands.py or prompt generator. Effort: M.
